name: Monster Truck Extreme Stunts
description: Monster Truck Extreme Stunts takes you on an electrifying ride through epic arenas filled with ramps, loops, and daring obstacles. Unleash massive power as you perform jaw-dropping flips, jumps, and tricks. Show off your stunt skills, crush everything in your path, and conquer every extreme course in this high-octane thrill ride! Web Dev <a href='https://www.crazygamesx.com/'>https://www.crazygamesx.com/</a>
instructions: WASD to drive your monster truck
tags: Driving, Kids, Mentolatux, monstertruck, Stunts, unity games, vehicle, WebGL
